text.title: Strangler Pattern Checklist — Product Dev Team Output Contract
text.summary: JSON-schema output contract the subagent applying strangler-pattern-checklist-product-dev-team must produce. Required fields, forbidden patterns, allowed transformations, plus valid + invalid worked examples.

section.title: Output schema (JSON Schema draft-07)

forbidden.pattern: Any gate in `gates` lacks owner or date.
ACL coverage <100% but traffic shift started.
Shadow-read divergence ≥0.1% but 7-day clock not reset.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Order arrays deterministically by their natural key before serialising.

example.note: All required fields populated; forbidden patterns absent.
Missing the first required field — schema rejects.

list.item: All required fields present and non-null.
